parameters.query:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT 
        -- SalariГ©
        XSAL.XSAL_0        AS code_salarie,
        XSAL.XMAT_0        AS matricule,
        XSAL.XNAMSAL_0     AS nom,
        XSAL.XPRENOM_0     AS prenom,
        XSAL.XEMAIL_0      AS email,
        XSAL.YTELE_0       AS telephone,
        XSAL.YSUP_0        AS code_superieur,
        XSAL.CREDATTIM_0   AS date_creation,
        XSAL.YDATCON_0     AS date_controle,
        XSAL.CREUSR_0      AS user_createur,

        -- CatГ©gorie (libellГ© FRA)
        CAT.LANMES_0       AS categorie,

        -- Poste / Service
        ZPOSTE.YTIT_0      AS poste,
        ZSERVICES.YTIT_0   AS service,

        -- CrГ©ateur rГ©solu : code X3 direct OU via YSALAUS
        COALESCE(
            CASE WHEN XSAL.CREUSR_0 LIKE 'S%' THEN XSAL.CREUSR_0 ELSE NULL END,
            YSALAUS.XSAL_0
        ) AS code_createur,

        -- Nom crГ©ateur
        COALESCE(CRE_DIRECT.XNAMSAL_0, CRE_LOGIN.XNAMSAL_0)   AS nom_createur,
        COALESCE(CRE_DIRECT.XPRENOM_0, CRE_LOGIN.XPRENOM_0)   AS prenom_createur,
        COALESCE(CRE_DIRECT.XEMAIL_0,  CRE_LOGIN.XEMAIL_0)    AS email_createur,
        COALESCE(CRE_DIRECT.YTELE_0,   CRE_LOGIN.YTELE_0)     AS tel_createur,
        COALESCE(CRE_DIRECT.YSUP_0,    CRE_LOGIN.YSUP_0)      AS sup_createur,

        -- SupГ©rieur du crГ©ateur
        COALESCE(SUP_DIRECT.XSAL_0,    SUP_LOGIN.XSAL_0)      AS code_sup_createur,
        COALESCE(SUP_DIRECT.XNAMSAL_0, SUP_LOGIN.XNAMSAL_0)   AS nom_sup_createur,
        COALESCE(SUP_DIRECT.XPRENOM_0, SUP_LOGIN.XPRENOM_0)   AS prenom_sup_createur,
        COALESCE(SUP_DIRECT.XEMAIL_0,  SUP_LOGIN.XEMAIL_0)    AS email_sup_createur,
        COALESCE(SUP_DIRECT.YTELE_0,   SUP_LOGIN.YTELE_0)     AS tel_sup_createur,

        -- PDG
        pdg.XSAL_0         AS code_pdg,
        pdg.XNAMSAL_0      AS nom_pdg,
        pdg.XPRENOM_0      AS prenom_pdg,
        pdg.XEMAIL_0       AS email_pdg,
        pdg.YTELE_0        AS telephone_pdg,

        -- DGA
        dga.XSAL_0         AS code_dga,
        dga.XNAMSAL_0      AS nom_dga,
        dga.XPRENOM_0      AS prenom_dga,
        dga.XEMAIL_0       AS email_dga,
        dga.YTELE_0        AS telephone_dga,

        -- FARHAT
        farhat.XSAL_0      AS code_farhat,
        farhat.XNAMSAL_0   AS nom_farhat,
        farhat.XPRENOM_0   AS prenom_farhat,
        farhat.XEMAIL_0    AS email_farhat,
        farhat.YTELE_0     AS telephone_farhat,

        -- BAALLAH
        baallah.XSAL_0     AS code_baallah,
        baallah.XNAMSAL_0  AS nom_baallah,
        baallah.XPRENOM_0  AS prenom_baallah,
        baallah.XEMAIL_0   AS email_baallah,
        baallah.YTELE_0    AS telephone_baallah,

        -- IA : salariГ©
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = XSAL.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_salarie,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = XSAL.XSAL_0) AS langue_salarie,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = XSAL.XSAL_0) AS bot_salarie,
    -- IA : crГ©ateur
  (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf 
      WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = COALESCE(CRE_DIRECT.XSAL_0, CRE_LOGIN.XSAL_0))  AS chat_id_createur,
  (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf 
      WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = COALESCE(CRE_DIRECT.XSAL_0, CRE_LOGIN.XSAL_0))  AS langue_createur,
  (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf 
      WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = COALESCE(CRE_DIRECT.XSAL_0, CRE_LOGIN.XSAL_0))  AS bot_createur,

        -- IA : supГ©rieur du crГ©ateur
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf 
            WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = COALESCE(SUP_DIRECT.XSAL_0, SUP_LOGIN.XSAL_0))  AS chat_id_superieur,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf 
            WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = COALESCE(SUP_DIRECT.XSAL_0, SUP_LOGIN.XSAL_0))  AS langue_superieur,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf 
            WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = COALESCE(SUP_DIRECT.XSAL_0, SUP_LOGIN.XSAL_0))  AS bot_superieur,

        -- IA : PDG (chat_id fixe)
        '8528101210' AS chat_id_pdg,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0  FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = pdg.XSAL_0) AS langue_pdg,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = pdg.XSAL_0) AS bot_pdg,

        -- IA : DGA
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0)     AS chat_id_dga,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0)     AS langue_dga,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0)     AS bot_dga,

        -- IA : FARHAT
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0)  AS chat_id_farhat,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0)  AS langue_farhat,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0)  AS bot_farhat,

        -- IA : BAALLAH
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_baallah,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS langue_baallah,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = baallah.XSAL_0) AS bot_baallah,

        -- DГ©lais et calculs
        CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT) AS delai_int,
        CASE 
            WHEN XSAL.YDATCON_0 != '1753-01-01' THEN XSAL.YDATCON_0
            ELSE DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), XSAL.CREDATTIM_0)
        END AS date_limite,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, XSAL.CREDATTIM_0, GETDATE()) AS jours_depuis_creation,
        CASE 
            WHEN XSAL.YDATCON_0 != '1753-01-01'
                THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), XSAL.YDATCON_0)
            ELSE 
                DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), XSAL.CREDATTIM_0))
        END AS jours_restants,
        CASE 
            WHEN XSAL.YDATCON_0 != '1753-01-01'
                THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, XSAL.CREDATTIM_0, XSAL.YDATCON_0) / 2
            ELSE 
                CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT) / 2
        END AS seuil_dga

    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL XSAL

    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.APLSTD CAT
        ON XSAL.XCAT_0 = CAT.LANNUM_0 
        AND CAT.LANCHP_0 = 14003 
        AND CAT.LAN_0 = 'FRA'

    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.ZPOSTE    ZPOSTE    ON XSAL.ZPOSTE_0 = ZPOSTE.YNUM_0
    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.ZSERVICES ZSERVICES ON ZPOSTE.YSRV_0 = ZSERVICES.YNUM_0

    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL CRE_DIRECT
        ON XSAL.CREUSR_0 LIKE 'S%'
        AND CRE_DIRECT.XSAL_0 = XSAL.CREUSR_0

    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL SUP_DIRECT
        ON CRE_DIRECT.XSAL_0 IS NOT NULL
        AND SUP_DIRECT.XSAL_0 = CRE_DIRECT.YSUP_0

    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.YSALAUS YSALAUS
        ON XSAL.CREUSR_0 NOT LIKE 'S%'
        AND YSALAUS.USER_0 = XSAL.CREUSR_0

    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL CRE_LOGIN
        ON YSALAUS.XSAL_0 IS NOT NULL
        AND CRE_LOGIN.XSAL_0 = YSALAUS.XSAL_0

    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL SUP_LOGIN
        ON CRE_LOGIN.XSAL_0 IS NOT NULL
        AND SUP_LOGIN.XSAL_0 = CRE_LOGIN.YSUP_0

    CROSS APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 VALEUR_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.ADOVAL WHERE PARAM_0 = 'YDELSAL') P

    CROSS APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0,XNAMSAL_0,XPRENOM_0,XEMAIL_0,YTELE_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0066') pdg
    CROSS APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0,XNAMSAL_0,XPRENOM_0,XEMAIL_0,YTELE_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0949') dga
    CROSS APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0,XNAMSAL_0,XPRENOM_0,XEMAIL_0,YTELE_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S1602') farhat
    CROSS APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0,XNAMSAL_0,XPRENOM_0,XEMAIL_0,YTELE_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0179') baallah

    WHERE 
        XSAL.XCAT_0 <> 4
        AND CAST(XSAL.CREDATTIM_0 AS DATE) >= '2024-01-01'
        AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.AOBJTXT A
            WHERE XSAL.XSAL_0 = A.IDENT1_0 AND A.ABREV_0 = 'XSAL'
        )
)

SELECT *, 'SALARIE'   AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants = 4
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'SUPERIEUR' FROM base WHERE jours_restants = 3
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'FARHAT'    FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= 8  AND jours_restants > 4
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'BAALLAH'   FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= seuil_dga AND jours_restants > 8
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'DGA'       FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= seuil_dga AND jours_restants > 8
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'PDG'       FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= 2
ORDER BY jours_restants ASC;

nodes.notes: Stoppe le workflow si aucun salariГ© non attachГ©

nodes.name: Structuration par Destinataire XSAL
nodes.notes: Groupe les salariГ©s non attachГ©s par destinataire avec escalade (PDG/DGA/SUPERIEUR/SALARIE/FARHAT/BAALLAH)

nodes.name: GГ©nГ©ration Messages Multilingues XSAL
nodes.notes: GГ©nГЁre les messages en FRA/ARA/ENG selon le destinataire (PDG/DGA/SUPERIEUR/SALARIE/FARHAT/BAALLAH)

Envoi Email XSAL

nodes.name: Envoi Telegram XSAL

nodes.name: Fin Workflow XSAL
nodes.notes: Toutes les notifications salariГ©s non attachГ©s envoyГ©es

main.node: No Operation No Chat ID XSAL
